dreadnaught.name: Dreadnought
dreadnaught.descriptionAppend: Storm Dive finale — it only turns up on 9-city maps, and it's the likelier of the two event finales: about 2 in 3 (double the [[ship-graveyard]]'s odds).

storm-dive.descriptionAppend: Finales: every map has one finale location. Count the cities (ignore the 4 forts) — 10 cities means an ordinary island is the finale (nothing special); 9 cities means an event finale: either the [[dreadnaught]] (~2 in 3) or the [[ship-graveyard]] worm pit (~1 in 3). Note: the ~2/3 split is observed, not confirmed from the game files.
